metadata.description: Practical agent skills for founders, operators, and data teams.

plugins.name: bizidea-kickstart
plugins.description: Guides a solo founder from raw idea to investor-ready pitch in 12 sequential steps, using Customer Development, Lean Startup, The Mom Test, Divergent/Convergent thinking, and the Business Model Canvas. Invokes critical AI personas that stress-test every deliverable. Produces image prompts for Gemini Nanobanana. Final deck rendered via the pptx skill.
